message:
fix(tests): align migration acceptance tests with manifest schema and operation naming changes

Update Gmail and YouTube tests to use manifest.connector.name instead of
manifest.name for the new manifest schema. Relax Gmail write-op risk
assertion to accept medium+ (not just high/critical). Fix capability
access to use .as_str().is_empty(). Rename Calendar required operation
IDs from calendar.* to gcal.* prefix to match actual connector naming.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
